programme.title: Live: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: Game 1 of the Eastern Conference First Round between the Montreal Canadiens and the Tampa Bay Lightning takes place at Benchmark International Arena. The regular-season series was closely contested, with both teams splitting their four meetings 2-2.

programme.title: NHL Post-Game on TNT
programme.desc: Liam McHugh, Anson Carter and Paul Bissonnette recap the night in the NHL.

programme.title: Avengers: Endgame
programme.desc: Adrift in space with no food or water, Tony Stark sends a message to Pepper Potts as his oxygen supply starts to dwindle. Meanwhile, the remaining Avengers -- Thor, Black Widow, Captain America and Bruce Banner -- must figure out a way to bring back their vanquished allies for an epic showdown with Thanos, the evil demigod who decimated the planet and the universe.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board

Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Boy Band Confidential: A Hollywood Demons Event
programme.desc: Boy band legends pull back the curtain on pop fame's darker side.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.sub-title: The Truth Is Out There ... and It Hurts
programme.desc: The trio must stop an otherworldly killer (Brad Greenquist) before he takes his next victim; Prue hopes to clarify her relationship with Andy.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: An ancestor, a witch burned at the stake in Salem, helps out when Prue is attacked by a 17th-century warlock.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: The Halliwell sisters fall under the control of Prue's boss, a warlock who uses astral projection to frame Prue for grand larceny.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Phoebe's former beau arrives, hoping to reconcile; Prue tries to save the auction house from bankruptcy; Piper's use of witchcraft for matchmaking goes awry.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: A vicious beast attacks Piper; Andy goes on a stakeout with an FBI agent who is also hunting for the beast; Phoebe has a vision of a car crash.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: A fierce demon has its eye on Prue and Phoebe; Piper's superstition about relationships starting on Friday the 13th has her frustrated.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Prue receives a plea for help from Max, a 13-year-old witch who has been kidnapped by a pair of vicious thugs.

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: Lily discovers nine decapitated female bodies while investigating a case originally sent to the Missing Persons Division in 1985.

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: When a prominent district attorney is posthumously linked to a scandal, Lilly reinvestigates his unsolved murder.

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: In light of a new fatality, a cult member's 1978 suicide is re-examined.

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: A referee's deathbed confession leads to the reopening of a 1976 case in which an over-matched fighter died during a bout.

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: A murder weapon is found during the city's gun recovery program, prompting detectives to take another look at the accidental 1987 drive-by shooting of a little girl.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Captain Marvel
programme.desc: Captain Marvel is an extraterrestrial Kree warrior who finds herself caught in the middle of an intergalactic battle between her people and the Skrulls. Living on Earth in 1995, she keeps having recurring memories of another life as U.S. Air Force pilot Carol Danvers. With help from Nick Fury, Captain Marvel tries to uncover the secrets of her past while harnessing her special superpowers to end the war with the evil Skrulls.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Avengers: Endgame
programme.desc: Adrift in space with no food or water, Tony Stark sends a message to Pepper Potts as his oxygen supply starts to dwindle. programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
programme.desc: Thrilled by his experience with the Avengers, young Peter Parker returns home to live with his Aunt May. Under the watchful eye of mentor Tony Stark, Parker starts to embrace his newfound identity as Spider-Man. He also tries to return to his normal daily routine -- distracted by thoughts of proving himself to be more than just a friendly neighborhood superhero. Peter must soon put his powers to the test when the evil Vulture emerges to threaten everything that he holds dear.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board

Living on Earth in 1995, she keeps having recurring memories of another life as U.S. Air Force pilot Carol Danvers. With help from Nick Fury, Captain Marvel tries to uncover the secrets of her past while harnessing her special superpowers to end the war with the evil Skrulls.

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: When a frazzled mother bursts into the Philadelphia Police Department claiming to know who might have killed her daughter at a 1968 debutante ball, Lilly reopens the case.

programme.desc: Several banks are robbed, surfacing clues that might help Lilly and the team solve a bank teller's 2000 murder.

programme.desc: To protect themselves from a power-stealing warlock, the sisters time travel to the 1970s where they encounter their family.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: A demon steals innocent children in order to use their sight to spot forces of good; a reporter sees Prue using her powers.

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: Lilly reopens the case of a young woman found murdered in her lover's apartment after the victim's brother gathers more information and finds more than one suspect.

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: When drawings depicting the murder of a child from 1993 are found next to the victim's grave, the detectives reopen the case, and the child's former caregiver becomes the prime suspect.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: When a priest comes forward with a person's confession related to the death of a 9-year-old boy, police reopen the case, and the boy's uncle becomes a prime suspect.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: The rare ring of a long-dead Philadelphia woman is found on the finger of a dead junkie, prompting Rush and the team to reopen the 1984 murder case.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: The investigation into an accidental death reopens when the victim's sister asserts she may have been murdered by members of a fraternity.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: When a black teen makes friends with his white peers, despite his family being a target of racism, he ends up a murder victim, and detectives must sift through a slew of suspects to find the killer.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Barbie
programme.desc: Barbie and Ken are having the time of their lives in the colorful and seemingly perfect world of Barbie Land. However, when they get a chance to go to the real world, they soon discover the joys and perils of living among humans.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 3
programme.desc: After the highs of winning the world championships, the Bellas find themselves split apart and discovering there aren't job prospects for making music with your mouth. But when they get the chance to reunite for an overseas USO tour, the group of nerds comes together to make some music one last time.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Horrible Bosses
programme.desc: Nick (Jason Bateman), Dale (Charlie Day) and Kurt (Jason Sudeikis) are workers who would like nothing better than to grind their oppressive employers into the dirt. Quitting their jobs is not an option, so -- fueled by alcohol and dubious advice from a criminal (Jamie Foxx) -- the men devise a complex and seemingly foolproof plan to permanently rid themselves of their terrible bosses. The problem is, any plan is only as clever as the brains behind it.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Horrible Bosses 2
programme.desc: Tired of always answering to others, Nick (Jason Bateman), Dale (Charlie Day) and Kurt (Jason Sudeikis) go into business for themselves. After demonstrating the prototype for an invention called the Shower Buddy, the guys attract the attention of Rex Hanson and his father, Bert. Bert invests in the trio's product, then cancels the order and steals their idea. Now heavily in debt and with no legal recourse, Nick, Dale and Kurt decide to kidnap Rex and use the ransom money to pay off their loans.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
